title: FDE readiness — Anthropic / OpenAI
note: Single source of truth. Consumed by both the MCP server (agents) and readiness.html (humans).

dimensions.label: Knowledge
dimensions.gap: Study the MCP spec + evals + enterprise deploy constraints — see course/prep/anthropic-openai-fde-readiness.md §1.

items.q: I can explain MCP and A2A, and when to use each
I can design an eval set + a groundedness / hallucination check
I know enterprise constraints: PII, tenant isolation, VPC / self-hosted inference

dimensions.label: Skills
dimensions.gap: Drill it: coding-drill-kit (prod Python from memory) + agentic-solution-architect (agent in 90 min).

items.q: I can write production Python from a blank page, no autocomplete
I can build a tool-using agent + grounded RAG + an eval gate in ~90 min
I can ship frontend + backend to production (Python / JS)

dimensions.label: Mindset
dimensions.gap: Rewire toward adoption-over-output and evidence-over-claims — readiness §3.

items.q: I optimize for production adoption, not a demo that worked once
I write the eval before the feature (evidence over claims)
Under ambiguity I find the smallest end-to-end win and move

dimensions.label: Behavior & habits
dimensions.gap: Adopt the routines in readiness §4: daily drill, weekly ship-to-prod + field note, close-the-loop.

items.q: I run a daily coding drill and ship something to prod weekly
I close the loops I open — no abandoned repos
I can teach a new tool back to a non-engineer in one page

dimensions.label: Portfolio proof
dimensions.gap: Ship one flagship agentic system to production, add an MCP server, and collect a vouch.

items.q: I have SHIPPED an LLM / agent system to production (a live URL)
A project passes its own eval in CI (a green earned by a run)
I have built / deployed an MCP server (Anthropic's exact deliverable)
I have a third-party VOUCH from someone who worked with me
